common.logout_confirm_body: Your progress is saved — you can resume by logging back in.

registration.new_participant: Welcome! Please fill in your information below.
registration.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
registration.error_not_loaded: Experiment not loaded yet. Please refresh the page.
registration.error_config_not_loaded: Experiment config not loaded. Please refresh.

survey.save_error: Failed to save. Please try again.
survey.session_complete_body: Great work — you've finished this session. Please close this tab and come back later for the next one.
survey.session_complete_body_with_break: Great work — you've finished this session. Come back in about {duration} to start the next one.
survey.session_complete_body_ready: Great work — you've finished this session. The next one is ready when you are.
survey.last_chunk_complete_body: You've finished every session of this experiment. Click Finish to submit your responses.
survey.welcome_back_body: You're {pct}% through this session ({completed} of {total} stimuli). Click below to resume where you left off.
survey.already_answered: You've already answered this. Pick another from the list above to continue.
survey.break_default_body: Nice work — you've finished a block. Take a moment to stretch, look away, drink water. The next block will start when you're ready.
survey.chunk_break_body: You've completed a chunk. Please take a short break before continuing.
survey.chunk_break_until: until your next chunk is available
survey.chunk_break_ready: Your break is over — you can continue now!
survey.no_response_saved: No response saved for this item.

review.no_items: No items to review. Complete the previous phase first.

audio.error_permission: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access and try again.
audio.error_no_device: Could not access microphone. Please check your device settings.
audio.error_not_supported: Audio recording is not supported in this browser.

timestamps.order_error: Start time must be before end time.
